'''âl-k-f-m''' ('''kalakfemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:labyrinth|labyrinth]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labyrinth|labyrinth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-k-f-m
|-
! Lemma
| kalakfemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thilakfemoko || jilakfemoko || shilakfemoko || kilakfemoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthulakfemoko || jujulakfemoko || shushulakfemoko || kukulakfemoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thulakfemoko || julakfemoko || shulakfemoko || kulakfemoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thulakfemoko || julakfemoko || shulakfemoko || kulakfemoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thelakfemoko || jelakfemoko || shelakfemoko || kelakfemoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thotholakfemoko || jojolakfemoko || shosholakfemoko || kokolakfemoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tholakfemoko || jolakfemoko || sholakfemoko || kolakfemoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tholakfemoko || jolakfemoko || sholakfemoko || kolakfemoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || lakfemoko || lakfemoko || lakfemoko || lakfemoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lakfemoko || lakfemoko || lakfemoko || lakfemoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lakfemoko || lakfemoko || lakfemoko || lakfemoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lakfemoko || lakfemoko || lakfemoko || lakfemoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠlakfemoko || jĂŠlakfemoko || shĂŠlakfemoko || kĂŠlakfemoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathalakfemoko || jajalakfemoko || shashalakfemoko || kakalakfemoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thalakfemoko || jalakfemoko || shalakfemoko || kalakfemoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thalakfemoko || jalakfemoko || shalakfemoko || kalakfemoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shalakfemithi || shalakfemiji || shalakfemishi || shalakfemiki
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || shalakfemĂŠthĂŠ || shalakfemĂŠjĂŠ || shalakfemĂŠshĂŠ || shalakfemĂŠkĂŠ
|-

|-

|-

|}
